title: Seagate to Participate in Upcoming Investor Events
text: FREMONT, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Seagate Technology Holdings plc (NASDAQ: STX), a world leader in mass-data storage infrastructure solutions, today announced that management is scheduled to participate in the following investor events: Event: Bank of America Securities Leveraged Finance Conference on Tuesday, November 28, 2023 Details: Hosting investor meetings Event: UBS Global Technology Conference on Wednesday, November 29, 2023 Details: Presentation at 9:55 AM PT / 12:55 PM ET and hosting.

title: Seagate (STX) Improves Exos CORVAULT 4U106 With 2.5PB Capacity
text: Seagate (STX) enhances its Exos CORVAULT to offer improved power efficiency per petabyte and reduce the total cost of ownership.
